keywords: drywall screws bulk price Africa, bugle head screws, gypsum board screws, construction screws Africa, drywall installation fasteners

heading.en: Africa Construction Boom: Drywall Screws Demand

body.en: Africa's construction sector is experiencing unprecedented growth, with the continent requiring an estimated $130-170 billion annually in construction investment through 2030. This drives massive demand for drywall screws/a> used in residential and commercial construction. Countries like Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana, and Zambia are seeing increased adoption of drywall construction methods for both residential and commercial buildings. TradeGo Fasteners/a> has supplied construction fasteners/a> to African markets since 2008, with established distribution networks in South Africa, Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, and Zambia. Our containers regularly reach Durban, Lagos, Mombasa, Accra, and Lusaka.

Understanding the different types of drywall screws/a> helps buyers order correctly: 1. Fine Thread Drywall Screws/a> (W drywall): For attaching drywall to metal studs (25-33 gauge). Sharp point, fine thread, black phosphate finish. 2. Coarse Thread Drywall Screws/a> (S drywall): For attaching drywall to wood studs. Bugle head, coarse thread, sharp point, black phosphate. 3. Self-Drilling TEK Screws/a>: For attaching drywall to steel studs thicker than 25 gauge. Feature drill point, no pre-drilling needed. 4. Laminator Screws: For attaching drywall to other drywall layers or to furring channels. Standard sizes: #6 x 1-5/8" (most common), #8 x 2-1/2", #6 x 1" (for cement board)

TradeGo offers competitive bulk pricing for African drywall screws/a> distributors: FOB Shanghai Prices (USD per 1000 pieces): #6 x 1-5/8" Coarse Thread (S): - 100 boxes (100pcs/box): $18-22/K-box - 500 boxes: $15-18/K-box - 2000+ boxes: $12-15/K-box #6 x 1-5/8" Fine Thread (W): - 100 boxes: $19-23/K-box - 500 boxes: $16-19/K-box - 2000+ boxes: $13-16/K-box #6 x 1-5/8" Self-Drilling: - 100 boxes: $22-26/K-box - 500 boxes: $18-22/K-box - 2000+ boxes: $15-18/K-box Prices include standard export packaging. CIF destination port pricing available upon request.

When importing drywall screws/a> to Africa, ensure compliance with relevant standards: South Africa: SABS 1575 (equivalent to EN 14592) Nigeria: SONCAP certification required Kenya: KEBS marking required General: ISO 9001:2015 certification recommended TradeGo Fasteners/a> holds ISO 9001:2015 certification and can provide SABS-certified products for South African market. All products undergo quality inspection before shipment, with optional third-party SGS inspection available. Key quality parameters: - Hardness: HRC 58-62 (case hardened) - Coating: Black phosphate 8-12 microns - Head Hunter quality: No cracks, consistent drive depth - Thread quality: Consistent pitch and depth

heading.en: How to Order Drywall Screws for Africa

body.en: Steps to place your order: 1. Determine Your Specifications: Identify thread type (coarse/fine/self-drilling), size (#6, #8), length (1", 1-5/8", 2", 2-1/2"), and quantity. 2. Calculate Container Requirements: A 20ft container holds approximately 800-1000 boxes (100pcs/box) of mixed drywall screws/a>. 3. Request a Quote: Contact TradeGo via WhatsApp with specifications and destination port for CIF pricing. 4. Confirm Order and Pay: 30% deposit to start production, balance before shipment. 5. Production and Shipment: 15-20 days production, 25-35 days ocean freight to African ports. Typical delivery timeline: 40-55 days from order confirmation to arrival at destination port. TradeGo offers flexible order quantities starting from 1 metric ton, making us accessible to smaller distributors and hardware stores.

answer.en: See the detailed analysis above for specifications, applications, and best practices for drywall screws bulk price africa procurement.
Common standards include ISO 898, DIN 933, ASTM F1554, and GB/T specifications depending on your market.

question.en: How do I choose a reliable supplier?
question.zh: 如何选择可靠的供应商？

answer.en: Look for manufacturers with ISO 9001 certification, documented QA processes, and proven export experience to your region.
